iterations.feature: baseline instrument panel (ring + stats + iteration log)
interactive ring — click a segment for that iteration's story card
iterations.broke: ring arcs invisible to the testing agent — svg role=img flattened the a11y tree, segments not focusable
iterations.fixed: real accessible controls: tabIndex=0, Enter/Space handler, role=img removed

iterations.feature: motion tokens + GSAP ring draw-on intro
iterations.broke: over-strict test assertion: orbit dot must visibly move — flaky under reduced-motion cloud browsers
iterations.fixed: plan refined to settled end-state assertions (L2); app unchanged

iterations.feature: flight-recorder replay — scrub and replay the loop's own history
learning curve — stacked run bars + cumulative lessons step-line
iterations.broke: checker returned status 'blocked' while its own conclusion said PASS with all steps green
iterations.fixed: verdict recorded from the evidence; platform discrepancy reported upstream

iterations.feature: harness cycle diagram — WRITE→VERIFY→BANK with the fail→LESSON loop
iterations.broke: 11px 'pass' connector label unreadable in the tester's screenshots
iterations.fixed: labels raised to 13.5px weight-500 (L4); rerun verified the label

iterations.feature: checker evidence inside story cards — failure-bundle excerpts
iterations.broke: tester clicked the replay diamond ('Seek to iteration 2') instead of the ring arc — look-alike controls
iterations.fixed: accessible names diverged + plan names the widget type (L5); rerun 17/17

iterations.feature: polish — OG meta, favicon, footer, hook line, mobile pass (5 real bugs fixed)
growth regression — intro scaled with data and hid the ring's controls
iterations.broke: at 8 iterations the draw-in left arcs invisible 3+ seconds; agent indexed mid-intro and found no clickable ring, then missed SVG-child controls intermittently
iterations.fixed: intro capped at a 0.9s total budget (L6) + controls hardened into real HTML button hit-targets (L1 update); agent verified 4/4

iterations.feature: trust audit — hostile agent review turned into committed proof
iterations.broke: greens under-evidenced (only failures had committed bundles), ring hid its failures, stale card on scrub, sub-AA contrast, CI freshness unproven
iterations.fixed: run histories committed for all 8 tests, failure-rim viz + audit trail table, stale-selection clear, contrast raised, SHA-gated CI — full suite green against the exact commit

iterations.feature: deep-linkable iterations — ?i=N opens a story card + copy-permalink button
failures-only filter — isolate the caught-failure iterations across ring, log, and stats
keyboard shortcuts overlay + full keyboard nav (the a11y capstone)
iterations.broke: the 'press ? for shortcuts' hint's aria-label overrode its visible text, hiding the '?' from the a11y-tree-reading cloud tester
iterations.fixed: removed the masking aria-label so the visible text is the accessible name (L7); rerun agent verdict PASS

iterations.feature: the presentation layer — Judge Mode (press J: a self-narrating briefing climaxing in 'The Checker On Trial'), the ring's glow, and the hero that states the idea
the invitation & the trophy — a prominent 'start the briefing' CTA, the shareable Loop Card (download PNG), and Failure Fossils (the exact broken state, preserved)
iterations.broke: the checker caught two a11y regressions: the CTA's aria-label masked its visible invitation (L7 again), and the Loop Card's text was SVG-only, invisible to the a11y tree
iterations.fixed: CTA accessible name now matches its visible text; the Loop Card gained an sr-only text layer (L8) — decision recorded: content-SVG needs a text equivalent
